transcript: Speaker A: Is your English good? Speaker B: So-so. Speaker A: What's your name? Speaker B: My name is Neha. Speaker A: Technically correct, but natives just say, I'm Neha. Speaker B: Okay. I have no one to practice my English with. Speaker A: Not a problem. Haven't you heard of AI English tutors? Speaker B: I don't want to speak with an AI to learn English. Speaker A: Did you know I'm an AI English tutor on MySivi? Speaker B: Wait, you? Speaker A: I'll create a personalized study plan for your language goals. You can make as many mistakes as you want without any embarrassment. Speaker B: Sounds good. And how can I talk to you? Speaker A: Just download MySivi. 10 minutes a day is all you need. Speaker B: You know what? I'm going to get it.
on_screen_text: Is Your English Good? So-so. What's Your Name? My Name Is Neha. Technically Correct, But Natives Just Say, I'm Neha. Okay. I Have No One To Practice My English With. Not a Problem. Haven't You Heard Of AI English Tutors? I Don't Want To Speak With An AI To Learn English. Did You Know I'm An AI English Tutor On Mysivi? Wait, You? I'll Create A Personalized Study Plan For Your Language Goals. You Can Make As Many Mistakes As You Want Without Any Embarrassment. Sounds Good. And How Can I Talk To You? Just Download Mysivi. MySivi 10 Minutes A Day Is All You Need. You Know What? I'm Gonna Get It.
summary: A woman chats with an AI avatar on a video call, receiving instant corrections on her English. The AI introduces the MySivi app as a judgment-free platform for personalized language practice. The user is convinced to download the app for quick daily sessions.
